description: stable expansion, instruction snapshots, automatic platform args, and resolved COPY cache identity match Docker

writes.Dockerfile:
ARG GLOBAL=global-default
ARG TARGETARCH
ARG BASE=base
FROM --platform=$TARGETPLATFORM ${BASE}
ARG GLOBAL
ARG EMPTY
ARG TARGETOS
ARG TARGETARCH
ARG DEFAULTED=${MISSING:-arg-default}
ENV INHERITED_SNAPSHOT="$INHERITED" START=before
ENV START=after SNAPSHOT=$START UNSET=$MISSING SINGLE='$GLOBAL' DOUBLE="$GLOBAL" ESCAPED=\$GLOBAL DOUBLE_ESCAPED="\$GLOBAL" DEFAULT=${MISSING:-fallback} EMPTY_SET=${EMPTY-default} EMPTY_NULL=${EMPTY:-default} ALTERNATE=${GLOBAL:+alternate} EMPTY_ALTERNATE=${EMPTY+alternate} ARG_DEFAULT="$DEFAULTED" PLATFORM="${TARGETOS}/${TARGETARCH}"
WORKDIR "/oracle/${MISSING:-work}"
ARG SOURCE=payload.txt
ARG DEST=/oracle/work/changed.txt
COPY "$SOURCE" "$DEST"
